programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Laura Zaspel (Farm Hero) takes you inside the cockpit for a high-flying look at the future of farming. From cutting-edge aerial applications to next-gen science and sustainability, Air Tractor’s technology is redefining how we grow from the ground up.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The episode opens with Michael Bellemare of Switch It Up Inc., who shares how a simple bar-napkin sketch grew into a million-dollar operation specializing in turnkey solar, LED lighting, and EV charging. With a passion for revitalizing the trades, Michael stresses the importance of training programs and investing in people as he maps out his goal of scaling to a $100M company—and even explores franchising with Kevin. Next, teacher-turned-inventor Sean Worthington introduces Raida Tech, where a bathtub question—“What is money?”—led to a new form of data-supremacy currency and safer, uncensored AI. Sean looks to the A-Team for marketing, sales, and customer acquisition support. Then, Dale Krueger of Tangible Assets LLC explains how his coin-collecting hobby evolved into an investment platform blending art and assets, now ready to scale beyond word-of-mouth investors. Finally, Richard Simon of New Home National Title showcases his on-call title insurance service and seeks guidance on breaking into TV advertising to reach homebuyers nationwide.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s overhaul day on Boom America, and the A-Team gets to work. Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail kick things off with Switch It Up, laying out strategies around “The Volume” while Kyle Reyes pushes for a powerful pivot—refocusing the company squarely on the booming trades community. Next, the team digs into Raida Tech, where Laura highlights how the company is operating 25 years ahead of the curve but desperately needs clearer marketing to match its groundbreaking innovation. American Stories creator Bob Cefail stops by to share the inspiration behind Boom America and the future of independent production in the U.S. From there, the A-Team turns to Tangible Assets, helping refine how Dale can monetize his coin collection business, boost credibility, and reach the right investors. Finally, New Home National Title gets a full diagnostic from the experts as they map out how the company can scale, gain visibility, and earn the recognition it deserves nationwide.

programme.title: The Big Reveal

programme.title: Forbidden Science - Love Doll
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Laura Zaspel (Farm Hero) takes you inside the cockpit for a high-flying look at the future of farming. From cutting-edge aerial applications to next-gen science and sustainability, Air Tractor’s technology is redefining how we grow from the ground up.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The episode opens with Michael Bellemare of Switch It Up Inc., who shares how a simple bar-napkin sketch grew into a million-dollar operation specializing in turnkey solar, LED lighting, and EV charging. With a passion for revitalizing the trades, Michael stresses the importance of training programs and investing in people as he maps out his goal of scaling to a $100M company—and even explores franchising with Kevin. Next, teacher-turned-inventor Sean Worthington introduces Raida Tech, where a bathtub question—“What is money?”—led to a new form of data-supremacy currency and safer, uncensored AI. Sean looks to the A-Team for marketing, sales, and customer acquisition support. Then, Dale Krueger of Tangible Assets LLC explains how his coin-collecting hobby evolved into an investment platform blending art and assets, now ready to scale beyond word-of-mouth investors. Finally, Richard Simon of New Home National Title showcases his on-call title insurance service and seeks guidance on breaking into TV advertising to reach homebuyers nationwide.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s overhaul day on Boom America, and the A-Team gets to work. Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail kick things off with Switch It Up, laying out strategies around “The Volume” while Kyle Reyes pushes for a powerful pivot—refocusing the company squarely on the booming trades community. Next, the team digs into Raida Tech, where Laura highlights how the company is operating 25 years ahead of the curve but desperately needs clearer marketing to match its groundbreaking innovation. American Stories creator Bob Cefail stops by to share the inspiration behind Boom America and the future of independent production in the U.S. From there, the A-Team turns to Tangible Assets, helping refine how Dale can monetize his coin collection business, boost credibility, and reach the right investors. Finally, New Home National Title gets a full diagnostic from the experts as they map out how the company can scale, gain visibility, and earn the recognition it deserves nationwide.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Sheriff Mark Lamb (Surviving Mann) and UFC Hall of Famer Ken Shamrock (Surviving Mann) uncover a breakthrough changing how we live in a world full of invisible forces. Join them as Aires Tech reveals the science behind a revolutionary technology built to protect the human body from electromagnetic stress—empowering performance in a wired world.

programme.title: Preview for Croatia's Plitvice Lakes - Europe's Natural Wonders Episode 2
programme.desc: 🌊 Europe’s Natural Wonders, Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes 🇭🇷 | Official Preview Trailer ✨ Step into a fairytale world of turquoise lakes, cascading waterfalls, and emerald forests in Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes National Park — one of Europe’s most extraordinary natural treasures. This short film is the official preview trailer for our full 2-hour cinematic nature experience, Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes, now streaming in breathtaking 4K on NatureStream.tv. 🎬 Journey along elevated wooden boardwalks as crystal waters flow from one lake to another through lush karst landscapes. Captured in ultra-high resolution, this film immerses you in the sights and sounds of one of UNESCO’s most iconic World Heritage Sites.

programme.title: Journey Through Corsica
programme.desc: Journey Through Corsica – Full Length Film (4K) | NatureStream.tv Embark on a breathtaking aerial and sea-level journey across the wild west coast of Corsica — where red granite cliffs plunge into turquoise coves, and the Mediterranean meets raw island wilderness. This preview trailer features spectacular drone cinematography and boat-based footage filmed around the Scandola Nature Reserve, Girolata Bay, and the rugged coastlines near Piana and Porto — some of the most dramatic seascapes in Europe. 🕊️ A NatureStream.tv Original — cinematic nature films designed for relaxation, focus, and pure visual immersion.

programme.title: Autumn's Grace: The Wasatch Mountains
programme.desc: The Wasatch mountains of Utah display nature's finest autumn colors. The stunning spectrum of the landscape ranges from dark reds to bright yellows, splashed across the mountains in exuberant splendor. A soothing acoustic soundtrack accompanies the scenery, filmed from above and within the autumn paradise of the Wasatch mountains. Run time approx. 1 hour 50 minutes.

programme.title: Keoma The Avenger 1976
programme.desc: In Keoma the Avenger, Franco Nero stars as a half-breed gunslinger who returns home from the Civil War to find his town enslaved by tyranny and violence. Haunted by visions and driven by a fierce sense of justice, Keoma faces his ruthless half-brothers and a brutal warlord in a struggle for freedom. With its haunting atmosphere, gritty violence, and powerful performances, this Spaghetti Western classic blends myth and vengeance into an unforgettable tale.

programme.title: The Gambling Terror 1937
programme.desc: In The Gambling Terror, cowboy hero Johnny Mack Brown takes on a ruthless gang that’s bleeding a frontier town dry with crooked gambling and brutal intimidation. Standing tall against the odds, he fights to bring law and order back to the West. Packed with gun-slinging action, high-stakes tension, and a dash of frontier romance, this thrilling Western proves that justice always calls the final hand.
